name: Facebook Lead Ads
shortDescription: Complete Facebook advertising platform integration for creating, managing, and optimizing lead generation campaigns. Build comprehensive ad workflows from campaign creation to lead form management.

actions.name: Get Ad Account Info
actions.description: Retrieves information about a Facebook Ad Account including ID, name, account status, balance, and currency

actions.name: Get Ad Account Insights
actions.description: Retrieves insights data for a Facebook Ad Account including campaign performance metrics

actions.name: Create Ad Campaign
actions.description: Creates a new Facebook Ad Campaign with specified parameters and targeting options

actions.name: Get Campaign Insights
actions.description: Retrieves performance insights and metrics for a specific Facebook Ad Campaign

actions.name: Get All Ad Campaigns
actions.description: Retrieves all campaigns associated with a Facebook Ad Account

actions.name: Update Ad Campaign
actions.description: Updates an existing Facebook Ad Campaign with new parameters and settings

actions.name: Delete Ad Campaign
actions.description: Deletes a Facebook Ad Campaign permanently from the account

actions.name: Create Ad Set
actions.description: Creates a new Facebook Ad Set within a campaign with targeting and budget parameters

actions.name: Update Ad Set
actions.description: Updates an existing Facebook Ad Set with new budget, targeting, or scheduling parameters

actions.name: Get All Ad Sets
actions.description: Retrieves all ad sets associated with a specific Facebook Ad Campaign

actions.name: Delete Ad Set
actions.description: Deletes a Facebook Ad Set permanently from the campaign

actions.name: Get Ad Set Insights
actions.description: Retrieves performance insights and metrics for a specific Facebook Ad Set

actions.name: Create Ad
actions.description: Creates a new Facebook Ad within an ad set using a specified creative

actions.name: Update Ad
actions.description: Updates an existing Facebook Ad with new creative, name, or status settings

actions.name: Delete Ad
actions.description: Deletes a Facebook Ad permanently from the ad set

actions.name: Create Lead Form
actions.description: Creates a new Facebook Lead Generation form with custom questions and privacy settings

actions.name: Get Lead Forms
actions.description: Retrieves all lead generation forms associated with a Facebook page

actions.name: Get Lead Form Info
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific lead generation form including questions and settings

actions.name: Archive Lead Form
actions.description: Archives a Facebook Lead Generation form making it inactive but preserving data

actions.name: Activate Lead Form
actions.description: Activates a Facebook Lead Generation form making it available for lead collection

actions.name: Create Ad Creative
actions.description: Creates a new Facebook Ad Creative with lead generation form integration and visual elements

actions.name: Update Ad Creative
actions.description: Updates an existing Facebook Ad Creative with new content, labels, or status

actions.name: Delete Ad Creative
actions.description: Deletes a Facebook Ad Creative permanently from the account

actions.name: Publish Ad
actions.description: Publishes a Facebook Ad by setting its status to active and making it live

actions.name: Get Messenger Lead Forms
actions.description: Retrieves Facebook Lead Generation forms eligible for Messenger integration

idealUseCases: Creating and managing comprehensive Facebook ad campaigns for lead generation
Building automated lead capture workflows with custom forms and follow-up sequences
Managing ad account performance tracking and campaign optimization
Developing targeted advertising campaigns with detailed audience segmentation
Creating dynamic ad creatives with lead generation forms integration
Automating campaign budget management and performance monitoring
Building multi-stage advertising funnels with ad sets and creative variations
Integrating Facebook lead ads with CRM systems and marketing automation
